suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify procedural expectations for fix-only tasks and compliance reporting: explicitly state when Paper-reference reads/TDD-first are mandatory vs optional, and require handoff.skillFeedback to reflect actual deviations (including direct `agent-browser` CLI usage when skill invocation is expected).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-feature reviews (fix-import-guards-retry and fix-onboard-guards-welcome) flagged procedure/feedback misalignment in ui-builder execution, despite correct code outcomes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a concrete IndexedDB profile-seeding recipe (keys and minimal record shape) for validating returning-user Welcome variants without iterative trial-and-error setup.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-onboard-guards-welcome review reported repeated exploratory storage attempts to establish single-profile state; current user-testing library note only states that pre-existing profile data is required.

rejectedObservations.observation: ui-builder Paper-reference-read exception note from fix-import-guards-retry.
